name: Test databao build with DuckDB
description: Initialize a project with DuckDB and build it, then compare results with expected introspection.
descriptionHtml: Initialize a project with DuckDB and build it, then compare results with expected introspection.

testStage.description: Initialize a project with DuckDB and build it, then compare results with expected introspection.

steps.name: Answering prompt ''What type of datasource do you want to add\?'' with ''duckdb''

parameters.name: pattern
parameters.value: 'What type of datasource do you want to add\?'

steps.name: Answering prompt ''Datasource name\?:'' with ''test duckdb conn''

parameters.value: 'Do you want to check the connection to this new datasource\? \[y/N\]:'
